content.speakerText: Thanks so much! So, 5 books, 2 weeks, can renew online?
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢了！就是5本、两周、能在线续借，对吧？

options.text: Exactly! Have a great day reading!
Sure, I'll send you the books tomorrow.
Actually, the due date is next Monday.
You can't renew online, you need to come in person.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Exactly! Have a great day reading!' 是对确认信息的礼貌回应，既确认了细节又表达了祝福。选项2错误地承诺送书，与对话场景不符；选项3和4否定了对方确认的信息，与 'Exactly!' 的肯定语气矛盾。

options.text: See you then! Bring your library card!
Oh, I'm sorry, we're closed next week.
Do you want to borrow more books?
Bye, don't forget to pay your fine.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'See you then! Bring your library card!' 是积极回应并补充关键提示，符合道别场景。选项2直接否定对方计划，不礼貌；选项3是新话题，偏离道别语境；选项4引入负面信息（罚款），破坏友好氛围。

content.speakerText: Alright, I'm heading out now. Thanks for your help!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我要走了，谢谢你的帮助！

options.text: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
I hope you come back soon.
No problem. See you next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!' 是标准、礼貌且完整的道别回应，包含感谢回应和祝福。选项2是提醒物品，属于新信息，打断道别流程；选项3虽礼貌但不如选项1自然；选项4虽然可接受，但缺少祝福语，不如正确答案完整。

content.hint: 道别时常用祝福句型，与 'Have a great day...' 搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Have a great day

content.template: See you ___! Bring your library card!
content.hint: 回应 'I'll see you next week!' 的标准用语
content.knowledgePoint: 道别回应固定搭配：See you then

content.template: Thanks for your help! No problem — ___ a wonderful day!
content.hint: 礼貌道别时常用动词，搭配 'a wonderful day'
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配：have a wonderful day

content.speakerText: Thanks so much! So, 5 books, 2 weeks, can renew online?
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢了！就是5本、两周、能在线续借，对吧？
expectedAnswers: Exactly! Have a great day reading!
Yep, that's right. Don't forget to renew before the due date.
Correct! You can renew online up to two times. Enjoy your books!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认了对方提到的5本书、两周期限和在线续借信息
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误，使用了恰当的道别表达
表达自然度：语气友好，符合日常口语习惯，有自然的语调起伏
关键词覆盖：使用了 'exactly', 'renew', 'online', 'due date', 'enjoy' 等场景关键词

expectedAnswers: See you then! Don't forget your library card!
Looking forward to it! Have a great day!
Cool, bye! Make sure you bring your card next time.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：积极回应对方的道别，并适当补充提醒信息
语言准确性：使用了正确的道别句型和口语表达，无语法错误
表达自然度：语气自然，符合真实对话节奏，避免生硬或机械重复
关键词覆盖：使用了 'see you then', 'library card', 'have a great day' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Alright, I'm off now. Really appreciate your help!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我要走了，非常感谢你的帮助！
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
No problem at all! See you soon!
Glad I could help! Take care and enjoy your day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：礼貌回应感谢，并自然结束对话
语言准确性：使用了正确的道别和致谢句型，语法无误
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合日常英语口语习惯，不机械
关键词覆盖：使用了 'you're welcome', 'have a wonderful day', 'see you soon', 'take care' 等道别高频表达
